name: Telegram bot settings
description: /settings preference toggles for budget alerts, household activity, and weekly digest with product-defined defaults.

done: Added /settings command with 3 toggle buttons: budget_alerts, household_activity, weekly_digest.
Defaults: budget_alerts on, household_activity off, weekly_digest off (match migration).
Toggles persist via telegram_bot_chats.preferences JSON column using new updateTelegramBotChatPreferences repo fn.
parsePreferences validates JSON + falls back to defaults on malformed input.
Unlinked users get Open App guidance, no settings.
pref: callback prefix handled in handleCallbackQuery; start.ts settings stub button wired.
Review medium findings fixed: TMA_URL extracted to shared constants.ts, inline defaults deduped, /help lists /settings.
Oracle review approved with no blockers; 112e cleared to start.
verification: Oracle review ses_110415fe1ffeV49uAI6FrCzMC4 approved, no blockers, 541 tests pass.

notes: Defaults: budget alerts on; household activity off; weekly digest off. No quiet hours/mute all.
